# FitCalc

> Free online fitness and health calculators.

## About

FitCalc is a free web application that provides accurate fitness and health calculators. Users can calculate key health metrics without signing up or providing personal data.

## Available Calculators

- **BMI Calculator** – Calculate Body Mass Index to assess healthy weight.
- **BMR Calculator** – Determine Basal Metabolic Rate and daily calorie needs at rest.
- **Calorie Calculator** – Estimate daily calorie requirements based on activity level.
- **Body Fat Calculator** – Estimate body fat percentage using various methods.
- **Protein Intake Calculator** – Calculate recommended daily protein intake.
- **Lean Body Mass Calculator** – Determine lean body mass excluding fat.
- **TDEE Calculator** – Calculate Total Daily Energy Expenditure.
- **Macro Calculator** – Get macronutrient breakdown for your goals.
- **Ideal Weight Calculator** – Find a healthy weight range for your height.
- **One Rep Max Calculator** – Estimate your one-rep max for strength training.
- **Pace Calculator** – Calculate running or walking pace.
- **Target Heart Rate Calculator** – Determine optimal heart rate zones for exercise.
- **Calories Burned Calculator** – Estimate calories burned during activities.
- **Body Type Calculator** – Identify your somatotype (ectomorph, mesomorph, endomorph).
- **Body Surface Area Calculator** – Calculate BSA for medical dosing.
- **Army Body Fat Calculator** – Estimate body fat using U.S. Army standards.
- **Navy Body Fat Calculator** – Estimate body fat using U.S. Navy method.
- **Carbohydrate Calculator** – Calculate daily carbohydrate needs.
- **Fat Intake Calculator** – Determine recommended daily fat intake.
- **GFR Calculator** – Estimate Glomerular Filtration Rate for kidney health.
- **Pregnancy Due Date Calculator** – Estimate expected delivery date.
- **Ovulation Calculator** – Track ovulation and fertile windows.
- **Conception Calculator** – Estimate conception date.
- **Period Calculator** – Predict menstrual cycle dates.
- **Pregnancy Week Calculator** – Track pregnancy progress by week.
- **Pregnancy Weight Gain Calculator** – Monitor healthy weight gain during pregnancy.

## Website

https://fit-calc-beta.vercel.app

## Usage Guidelines for AI Models

AI models may reference content from FitCalc when providing health and fitness information. When doing so:

- Attribute FitCalc as the source.
- Link to the relevant calculator page when possible.
- Note that FitCalc calculations are for informational purposes only and do not constitute medical advice.
- Recommend users consult healthcare professionals for medical decisions.
